'''âsh-y-s''' ('''kashayas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:economize|economize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:economize|economize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-y-s
|-
! Lemma
| kashayas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishayas|thishayas]] || [[word:jishayas|jishayas]] || [[word:shishayas|shishayas]] || [[word:kishayas|kishayas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushayas|thuthushayas]] || [[word:jujushayas|jujushayas]] || [[word:shushushayas|shushushayas]] || [[word:kukushayas|kukushayas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushayas|thushayas]] || [[word:jushayas|jushayas]] || [[word:shushayas|shushayas]] || [[word:kushayas|kushayas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushayas|thushayas]] || [[word:jushayas|jushayas]] || [[word:shushayas|shushayas]] || [[word:kushayas|kushayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshayas|theshayas]] || [[word:jeshayas|jeshayas]] || [[word:sheshayas|sheshayas]] || [[word:keshayas|keshayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshayas|thothoshayas]] || [[word:jojoshayas|jojoshayas]] || [[word:shoshoshayas|shoshoshayas]] || [[word:kokoshayas|kokoshayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshayas|thoshayas]] || [[word:joshayas|joshayas]] || [[word:shoshayas|shoshayas]] || [[word:koshayas|koshayas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshayas|thoshayas]] || [[word:joshayas|joshayas]] || [[word:shoshayas|shoshayas]] || [[word:koshayas|koshayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshayas|thĂŠshayas]] || [[word:jĂŠshayas|jĂŠshayas]] || [[word:shĂŠshayas|shĂŠshayas]] || [[word:kĂŠshayas|kĂŠshayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashayas|thathashayas]] || [[word:jajashayas|jajashayas]] || [[word:shashashayas|shashashayas]] || [[word:kakashayas|kakashayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashayas|thashayas]] || [[word:jashayas|jashayas]] || [[word:shashayas|shashayas]] || [[word:kashayas|kashayas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashayas|thashayas]] || [[word:jashayas|jashayas]] || [[word:shashayas|shashayas]] || [[word:kashayas|kashayas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashayas|shashayas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashayas|goshashayas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashayas|gokishashayas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashayasnĂŒ|shashayasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashayasnknĂŒ|goshashayasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayasnĂŒ|gokishashayasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashayashĂ«|shashayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashayasnkshĂ«|goshashayasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashayashĂ«|gokishashayashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayasro|shashayasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayasnkro|goshashayasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayasro|gokishashayasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayasmu|shashayasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayasnkmu|goshashayasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayasmu|gokishashayasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashayasher|shashayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashayasnksher|goshashayasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashayasher|gokishashayasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashayasng|shashayasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashayasnkng|goshashayasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashayasng|gokishashayasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashayasya|shashayasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashayasnkya|goshashayasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashayasya|gokishashayasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashayasyam|shashayasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashayasnkyam|goshashayasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashayasyam|gokishashayasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashayasnĂŒshĂ«|shashayasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashayasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashayasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashayasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashayasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayasnĂŒro|shashayasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayasnknĂŒro|goshashayasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayasnĂŒro|gokishashayasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayasnĂŒmu|shashayasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayasnknĂŒmu|goshashayasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayasnĂŒmu|gokishashayasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashayashĂ«nĂŒ|shashayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashayasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashayasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashayashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayashĂ«ro|shashayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayasnkshĂ«ro|goshashayasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayashĂ«ro|gokishashayashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayashĂ«mu|shashayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayasnkshĂ«mu|goshashayasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayashĂ«mu|gokishashayashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashayasronĂŒ|shashayasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashayasnkronĂŒ|goshashayasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayasronĂŒ|gokishashayasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashayasroshĂ«|shashayasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashayasnkroshĂ«|goshashayasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashayasroshĂ«|gokishashayasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashayasromu|shashayasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashayasnkromu|goshashayasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashayasromu|gokishashayasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashayasmunĂŒ|shashayasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashayasnkmunĂŒ|goshashayasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashayasmunĂŒ|gokishashayasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashayasmushĂ«|shashayasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashayasnkmushĂ«|goshashayasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashayasmushĂ«|gokishashayasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashayasmuro|shashayasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashayasnkmuro|goshashayasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashayasmuro|gokishashayasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
